name: shadcn-blazor-theme-build
description: Tailwind CSS build pipeline for ShadCn.Blazor

scripts.copy:fonts: npx shx mkdir -p ../ShadCn.Blazor.Theme.Default/wwwroot/fonts && npx shx cp node_modules/@fontsource-variable/geist/files/*.woff2 ../ShadCn.Blazor.Theme.Default/wwwroot/fonts/ && npx shx cp node_modules/@fontsource-variable/geist-mono/files/*.woff2 ../ShadCn.Blazor.Theme.Default/wwwroot/fonts/
scripts.build:theme: npm run copy:fonts && npm run build:css
